case_title: BRUCE BURGE VS. ANTHONY COLEMAN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURGE, BRUCE SERVED SEP-14-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, ANTHONY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURGE, BRUCE AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, ANTHONY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN, ANTHONY
